title: Office status for ESDC employees - Canada.ca
content:
## Office status for ESDC employees
All our offices in the National Capital Region are open and operate during normal business hours.
All employees are encouraged to call the National Headquarters   Employee Voice Bulletin System ( 819-997-3000 or 1-877-374-4732 ) to get   the most up to date information. The number is also on the back of your   identification card.
Please contact your manager should you need further information.
